dailyOutages.plant: At Sreenagar 132/33kV substation, a sky wire tore and fell on the 33kV bus. Consequently, the 33kV incomers of both T-1 and T-2 transformers tripped, causing a full interruption of about 34 MW.
dailyOutages.reason: At Sreenagar 132/33kV substation, a sky wire tore and fell on the 33kV bus. Consequently, the 33kV incomers of both T-1 and T-2 transformers tripped, causing a full interruption of about 34 MW.

dailyOutages.plant: Around 120 MW interruption occurred from 14:59 hrs to 15:16 hrs at Mymensingh 132/33kV grid substation, as both T-1 and T-2 transformers tripped
dailyOutages.reason: due to a fault on the 33kV Aqua feeder. At 15:16 hrs, only T-2 transformer was switched on and is running in parallel with T-3 transformer. T-1 transformer could not be switched on due to a problem with its 33kV incomer breaker, which requires inspection as informed by the grid personnel. At present, around 50 MW load shedding is occurring.
dailyOutages.full_desc: Around 120 MW interruption occurred from 14:59 hrs to 15:16 hrs at Mymensingh 132/33kV grid substation, as both T-1 and T-2 transformers tripped due to a fault on the 33kV Aqua feeder. At 15:16 hrs, only T-2 transformer was switched on and is running in parallel with T-3 transformer. T-1 transformer could not be switched on due to a problem with its 33kV incomer breaker, which requires inspection as informed by the grid personnel. At present, around 50 MW load shedding is occurring.
